note: The existing four-dimension impact framework — the starting scaffold for the executive layer. A starting point to test and extend, not the finished answer.

dimensions.label: Operational capacity
dimensions.describes: Whether the service does more, faster, or with less effort — efficiency and throughput value.

dimensions.label: Institutional readiness
dimensions.describes: Whether the institution is more prepared to adopt, govern, and sustain AI — capability and conformance value.

dimensions.label: Risk reduction
dimensions.describes: Whether exposure to compliance, privacy, equity, and operational harm is lowered.

dimensions.label: System-level influence
dimensions.describes: Whether a transformation changes options and outcomes beyond the single service — institutional and cross-unit value.
